name: @ever-works/serpapi-plugin
description: SerpAPI Plugin - Web search using SerpAPI (Google, Bing, Yahoo, and more)

plugin.name: SerpAPI
plugin.description: Web search using SerpAPI with support for Google, Bing, Yahoo, DuckDuckGo, Baidu, and Yandex engines.

envVars.name: PLUGIN_SERPAPI_API_KEY
envVars.description: SerpAPI API key (optional - can be set via admin/user settings)
